title: Solana SISO Testbed: HP3C 2026 Paper-Facing Artifact for Bottleneck Onset and Saturation Behavior
description: Archival paper-facing artifact for HP3C 2026 supporting queueing-inspired gray-box analysis of bottleneck onset and saturation behavior in a private Solana blockchain testbed. The archive captures the canonical synthetic-load evidence path raw_selected -> processed -> results -> figures together with synthesis outputs and reproducibility-oriented documentation.
